description_long: This bird object features a highly angular and abstract form, composed of sharp, intersecting planes and elongated elements. The body is predominantly black with a glossy finish, accented by a striking orange and yellow beak that curves downward. Thin, blue, rod-like structures extend vertically and diagonally, suggesting stylized legs or support elements. The wings are represented by jagged, geometric extensions, with one side displaying a more pronounced, blade-like projection. The overall silhouette is dynamic and aggressive, evoking the impression of a large, predatory bird in a modern, sculptural style. The combination of black, blue, and orange hues creates a visually arresting contrast, making the object stand out in any urban environment.
description: An abstract, angular bird with a glossy black body, vivid orange beak, and blue rod-like extensions, featuring sharp, geometric wings and a dynamic silhouette.
description_view_0: Front view shows the prominent orange beak, angular black body, and intersecting blue rods, with the wings and head structure clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated beak, thin blue leg-like rods, and the sharp, blade-like wing extension.
description_view_2: Rear view emphasizes the geometric, faceted back and the arrangement of blue rods, with less visibility of the beak.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the beak's curve, the jagged wing structure, and the vertical blue rods extending downward.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid with subtle gradients and color blocking
